titleStmt.title: SII 41.21: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 21. (A.R. No. 20 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: Narth wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

This is dated in the 4th Year of the reign of Parakēśarivarmaṉ alias Rājēndra Sōḻadēva who may be identified with Rājēndra I (of acc. 1012 A.D.) on grounds of palaeography and on account of the title Uttamasōḻa-Milāḍuḍaiyar of the donor, being taken after the King's title Uttamasōḻa.

It records the gift of 1(1/2) vēli and 3 mā of land by purchase from the sabhā of Tirukkōvalūr by Pirāntakaṉ Yādava Bhīmaṉ alias Uttamasōḻa-Milāḍudaiyar of Bhārggavagōtra at the instance of Āviyūruḍaiya Araiyaṉ Malaiyar-Ādittaṉ alias Chēdi-nāḍu vēlāṉ, for daily food offering (akkār-aḍalai) at noon to god Tiruvīraṭṭāṉam-uḍaiya mahādēva at Tirukkōvalūr. The donor gave also 280 sheep to provide with milk and ghee for the said food offering. The land and the sheep were entrusted to the members of the tiruvuṇṇāḻigai-sabhai of the temple. The record mentons Taittiriya-vaḷai as the name of a plot of land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecari panmarāṉa śrī rājentracoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 4āvatu coḻamaṇṭalattu malā
ṭāṉa jaṉaṉātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattu brahmadeyan=tirukkovalūr sabhaiyom nilavilai
yāvaṇam bhārggavakottirattu pirān=takaṉ yātava bhīmanāṉa Uttamacoḻa malāṭuṭaiyār Ivvūrt ti
ruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiya mahādevar nicatamum madhyāṉattu Akkāraṭalai Amurtu ceytaruḷa sabhaiom vi
ṟṟuk kuṭutta nilamāvitu Ivvūr kiḻvāyp pulattu kovalūrk kuṟai nilam Orumāvum Atti Eḻumā
ccey nilam Eḻumāvu Ilāppuñci nilam mukkāle Iraṇṭu māvum taitattiriya vaḷaiyil muṉ kova
lviṭaṅkarkkum Āṭavallārkkuṅ kuṭutta nilam nikki niṉṟa nilam Eṭṭumāvum Āka nilam Oṉṟaraiye muṉṟu
māvum viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷḷa Uṭaiya vilai dravyamum Iṟai dravyamum Aṟak koṇṭu Iṉṉila miku
tikkuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka cantrātittavaliṟaiiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttom Inṉilattukkuriya kiṇīrkku mi
ynirkku murittāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom sabhaiōm pirān=takaṉ yātavar bhīmanāna Uttamacoḻa malā
ṭuṭaiyārkku Iṉṉilaṅ koṇṭu Itdevar tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sabhaiyār ceyyum nivan=taniccalpa
ṭi madhyāṉattu Akkāraṭalai Amurtu ceytaruḷa Akkāraṭalaikku Arici patteṇ kuttal Arici nāṉāḻi
yum payaṟṟup paruppu tūpparuppu nāṉāḻiyum caṟkarai patiṉṉaimpalamum porikaṟiyamurtu Onṟu
m Aṭaikkāyamirtu veṟuṅkāy Eṭṭum veṟṟilai Irupattunālum Inṉilaṅ koṇṭu Ipparicu
ceyvitākavum Ivakkāraṭalaikke pālamirtu Eṇṇāḻikkum neyyamirtu Urikkum tiruvuṇṇāḻikaiyār
vacam cantrātittaval cāvāmuvāp perāṭāka kuṭutta Āṭu Irunūṟṟeṇ(m)patum Āka Iṉṉilamum Ivvāṭu
ṅkoṇṭu nicatappaṭi madhyāṉattu Akkāraṭalai cantrātittavallamurtu ceyvippomānom It
devar tiruvaṇṇāḻikai sabhaiOm cantrātittaval Iṉṉilaṅkoṇṭu Iṉṉivan=tam ceyakkaṭavar
kaḷāka Āviyūruṭaiya Araiyaṉmalaiyarātittanṉāna cetiṉāṭu veḷān viṇṇappattāl ceytatu
ḷatu panmāheśvaraḷarakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
